title: Summarize Slack starred chats
goal: Review starred Slack channels and direct messages, summarize what is happening, and list what the user needs to do next.
next_action: Open Slack in the browser, review all starred chats, and produce a summary plus TODOs for the user.

history.result: Your starred Slack workspace at Amazon is centered around the **SFAI (Shopping Foundation AI)** team, specifically the **post-training, alignment, and Rufus** workstreams. The past week has been focused on **infrastructure transitions** (Greenland → EKS migration by 04/30, EOL model deprecation), **seating consolidation** in Seattle/Cricket office, **RL training infrastructure** (StormRL, SLIME, GRS), and ongoing **multimodal/benchmark work** with Xin Liu. There are several action items requiring your attention, including a survey deadline, model migration requirements, and a follow-up with Swati Sachdeva on annotation UI.
